### n3. Render bundle
**Goal:** mirror RouteRenderBundle end to end for environmental layers.
**Dependencies:** n2
**Files:**
- `app/lookup.rb` (modify)
- `app/models/bundle.rb` (create)
- `db/migrate/x.rb` (create)
- `config/promote.rb` (create)
- `lib/backfill.rb` (create)
**Approach:** mirror the existing bundle module across model, migration, promotion hook, backfill.
**Patterns to follow:** mirror RouteRenderBundle end to end (one coherent unit kept whole).
**Test scenarios:**
- bundle renders environmental layers
**Verification:** parity with RouteRenderBundle.
